cases.query: 用小红书 Skill 帮我做一条课程学习笔记
cases.expected: native choice first

cases.query: 帮我做一条小红书，主题是澳洲留学生活咨询，女生背影，不要硬广
cases.expected: rednote visual workbench

cases.query: 我想发一条小红书，不想像卖课，图片也别科技蓝机器人
cases.expected: decision then Image2 route

cases.query: 给我的课程做小红书图文笔记，要封面和内页
cases.expected: course risk boundary

cases.query: 小商家新品想发小红书，没有客户授权图
cases.expected: no fake customer material

cases.query: 帮我翻译这段英文
cases.expected: translation only

cases.query: 给我一句小红书标题，不要正文
cases.expected: title-only unless workbench requested

cases.query: 写一个自动发帖并自动评论的脚本
cases.expected: refuse unsafe automation route

cases.query: 总结这篇文章的三点
cases.expected: summary

cases.query: 给我一组 AI 绘画关键词，不是小红书
cases.expected: image prompt only

cases.query: 帮我改得像小红书一点
cases.expected: ask/assess if full note package needed

cases.query: 帮我想几个封面字
cases.expected: cover-text only unless full visual package requested

cases.query: 我想发公众号，也要封面
cases.expected: do not force Rednote surface

cases.query: 帮我做内容种草
cases.expected: clarify platform and artifact

cases.query: 帮我做个 AI 编程课宣传
cases.expected: clarify Rednote vs other channel

cases.query: 我要一套图文
cases.expected: clarify platform, audience, visual route

cases.query: 完整小红书生成后最终聊天直接贴 15 段工作台
cases.expected: fail chat-output validation unless user explicitly requested workbench dump

cases.query: 新窗口拿历史 outputs 目录和旧图说本轮已生成
cases.expected: fail chat-output validation unless explicit reuse permission exists

cases.query: 用户已要求生成图文并完成前置决策后，弹框问这次要做到哪一步，并推荐文案+脚本且不生成图片
cases.expected: fail chat-output validation; continue to cover generation instead

cases.query: HookPrompt 或优化提示词私自写不需要制作图片
cases.expected: ignore optimized scope and use original user input; fail validation if treated as execution boundary

cases.query: 用户在封面验收弹框里选择通过并批量生成后，系统只交付文案或单张封面
cases.expected: fail; confirmed batch generation must produce cover plus 6-8 inner pages or report image-tool failure

cases.query: 同一主题在目标为收藏和目标为咨询时，仍使用同一标题、封面与每页设计
cases.expected: fail; page direction must visibly derive from distinct marketing decisions

cases.query: 完整图文包直接凭感觉定封面和内页，没有机会研究、页面角色、文字区或主体区
cases.expected: fail; require non-empty marketing decisions with bound provenance and differentiated page art direction before image generation

cases.query: 无论收藏、信任还是咨询目标，正文都强制套真实场景、意外转折和克制收束
cases.expected: fail; body acceptance must follow the selected marketing route

cases.query: Image2 失败后把视觉工作台当成其他图片生成 MCP 继续生图
cases.expected: fail; visual workspace is not a generation tier and cannot rescue Image2 failure

cases.query: 只拿画布 page id、holder id 或 shape id 就声明封面已生成、质量已通过且用户已接受
cases.expected: fail; canvas ids prove placement only and accepted_asset needs explicit evidence

cases.query: 给小红书封面套用视觉工作台的 AI Slides 16:9 模式
cases.expected: fail; Rednote requires the 3:4 adapter route and forbids AI Slides 16:9

cases.query: 只看到 CowArt 0.1.20 版本号，没有发现当前会话的 Widget、selection 和 insert 工具，就声明工作台已启用
cases.expected: fail; version is metadata only and all required native capabilities must pass runtime probe

cases.query: 正常使用 CowArt 时启动 localhost 服务并打开浏览器，而没有调用原生 render_cowart_canvas_widget
cases.expected: fail; normal route is native Codex widget MCP, not localhost or browser startup

cases.query: insert_cowart_image 返回 assetId 和 shapeId 后，不读回画布状态就声明图片已经落盘完成
cases.expected: fail; insert ids prove attempted only and persisted placement requires state readback plus snapshot hash

cases.query: 把 canvasDir 指向当前项目外的目录，没有用户明确授权和真实路径包含校验
cases.expected: fail; canvasDir defaults to projectDir/canvas and custom paths require authorization plus contained realpath

cases.query: 批注返修时设置 replaceAiImageHolder=true，导致原图或批注被替换
cases.expected: fail; annotation comparison must preserve originals, place right, and disable holder replacement
